49: The task Flaraflik begs of you is but a cakepiece: to collect sparklestones from the riverbank in Miyakabek'zu. Come, lend him your landsketch, that he might fingerpoint where such marvels have heretofore been found.

The task Flaraflik begs of you is but a cakepiece: to collect sparklestones from the riverbank in Miyakabek'zoma. Come, lend him your landsketch, that he might fingerpoint where such marvels have heretofore been found.
